mapper.select: SELECT m.* FROM matches m JOIN teamstaff ts ON m.team_staff_name = ts.team_staff_name WHERE ts.team_league_gb = 'K5'and m.match_result is not null and m.match_score is not null
SELECT m.* FROM matches m JOIN teamstaff ts ON m.team_staff_name = ts.team_staff_name WHERE ts.team_league_gb = 'K5' and m.match_result is null and m.match_score is null
